title: Approve rank-drop UI change shipped under ADR-0001 (Task 4)
description: The test harness and all unit tests are implemented and green (28/28). One change alters rendered UI: KeywordTable.tsx now renders rank drops (now>prev) as '↓ N' in text-danger instead of '—' (which previously collapsed drops into no-change). This is a correctness fix. No drop row exists in current mock data, so no visible change today, but the rendered-output behavior is new. Separately, format.ts NaN behavior ($NaN / NaN% leaking to UI) was deliberately pinned, not guarded — flagging in case product wants a display guard.

title: Approve rank-drop UI change landed under ADR-0001 (branch dev-clone/adr-0001-test-harness)
description: ADR-0001 implementation is committed and green (28/28, tsc clean) on branch dev-clone/adr-0001-test-harness, commit 199409b. One change alters rendered UI: KeywordTable now renders rank drops (now>prev) as '↓ N' in text-danger instead of '—' (which previously collapsed drops into no-change). This is a correctness fix; no down-move row exists in current mock data, so no visible change today, but rendered-output behavior is new. Separately, format.ts NaN behavior ($NaN/NaN% leaking to UI) was deliberately pinned in tests, not guarded — flagging in case product wants a display guard.

title: Code Review verdict: APPROVE — ADR-0001 @ 199409b (cr-f1 resolved; 3 latent follow-ups)
description: Re-review after workspace reset and re-commit to 199409b. Verified against the live tree: 28/28 tests green, tsc clean, gating rank-drop defect (cr-f1) fixed and intact. Verdict APPROVE. The t4 UI change renders rank drops as '↓ N' in red — correct behavior, no down-move row in current mock data so no visible change today. Three format.ts items are pre-existing, latent (zero call sites), and pinned in tests — follow-up backlog before live-data wiring.

title: Security re-scan — 2 Medium findings STILL OPEN (local-seo-agency @ 199409b)
description: Re-scan at re-commit 199409b confirms both prior Medium findings remain unremediated (no overrides block in package.json, page.tsx:66-67 markup unchanged). 0 new security issues. New landing-claude page is clean. @google/generative-ai still unused. Decide whether to fix now or accept the latent risk.

title: Release v0.2.3 created locally — approve to publish + reconcile orphaned tags
description: A PATCH release (0.2.0→0.2.3) was committed and tagged locally (commit 218a0ca, annotated tag v0.2.3). It surfaces hidden rank drops, adds a node --test harness + pure rank.ts, and ships ADR-0001 docs. Versioning skipped 0.2.1/0.2.2 because those tags still exist on commits orphaned by a workspace reset. Decide whether to publish and whether to clean up the orphaned tags.
